## Summary

Describe the change and its user-visible effect.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm run check`
- [ ] `pnpm run test`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, keys, tokens, or outbox data are included
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior or configuration changes

## Mainnet impact

Explain whether this changes signing, transaction validation, X posting, or any
other irreversible behavior. Write `None` when it does not.
